# PingID Administration Guide

> AI agents should consult [Docs for Agents](https://developer.pingidentity.com/build-with-ai/docs-for-agents.md)
> for guidance on navigating Ping Identity documentation.

## Pingid

- [Untitled](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/_orphan_files_old/common_product_keydefs_old2.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring a PingFederate policy for passwordless authentication with a security key](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_pf_policy_for_passwordless_authentication_security_key.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring a PingFederate policy for passwordless authentication with FIDO biometrics](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_pf_policy_for_passwordless_authentication_fido_biometrics.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring a PingFederate policy for passwordless authentication with FIDO2 passkeys](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_pf_policy_for_passwordless_authentication_fido2_passkeys.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring FIDO2 biometrics for MFA authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_fido2_biometrics_mfa_authentication.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring FIDO2 biometrics for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_fido2_biometrics_for_pid.md): Overview of legacy PingID FIDO2 platform biometrics, including supported devices and high-level steps to enable passwordless or MFA authentication.
- [(Legacy) Configuring FIDO2 passwordless authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_fido2_passwordless_auth.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring security key authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/configuring_security_key_auth.md)
- [(Legacy) Configuring the FIDO2 security key for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/configuring_fido2_security_key.md): How to configure PingID FIDO2 security key authentication, including passwordless and manual authentication use cases, setup steps, and supported devices.
- [(Legacy) Customizing the HTML Form Adapter for passwordless authentication with a security key](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/customizing_html_adapter_for_passwordless_auth_security_key.md)

- [Configuration for use with Entra ID-joined devices](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuration_for_use_with_entra_id.md): This topic describes how to set up PingID Windows Login - Passwordless for use with Entra ID-joined devices.
- [Configuration for use with RDP](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuration_for_use_with_rdp.md)
- [Configure PingID authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configure_authentication.md): Overview of PingID authentication configuration options section with links to configuring mobile app, desktop app, FIDO2, YubiKey, OATH, email, and SMS/voice methods.
- [Configure the PingID service](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configure_service.md): Overview of PingID service configuration options section with links to configuring support messages, enrollment settings, device management, and authentication methods.
- [Configuring a composite adapter](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_composite_adapter.md)
- [Configuring a device lock policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configure_device_lock_policy.md): How to configure a PingID device lock policy in the PingID admin portal to require authenticating devices to have the lock feature enabled.
- [Configuring a disallowed devices policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_disallowed_devices_policy.md): How to configure a PingID disallowed devices policy in the PingID admin portal to block specific device brands and models from authenticating.
- [Configuring a geovelocity anomaly rule (web policy)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_geovelocity_anomaly_rule.md)
- [Configuring a global authentication policy (default policy)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_global_authentication_policy_default.md): How to configure the PingID default policy, which applies globally to applications that have no app-specific policy defined.
- [Configuring a limit push notifications rule](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/configuring_limit_push_rule.md)
- [Configuring a minimum OS policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_minimum_os_policy.md): How to configure a PingID minimum OS policy in the PingID admin portal  to block Android and iOS devices running OS versions earlier than the specified minimum.
- [Configuring a mobile OS version access rule (web policy)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_mobile_os_version_rule.md)
- [Configuring a new PingID SDK app](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_sdk/pid_sdk_config_new_app.md)
- [Configuring a no rooted or jailbroken devices policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_no_rooted_jailbroken_devices_policy.md): How to configure a PingID policy to block rooted or jailbroken devices from pairing or authenticating.
- [Configuring a PingFederate policy for a consistent passwordless authentication experience](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_pf_policy_for_passwordless_authentication.md)
- [Configuring a PingFederate policy for passwordless authentication with legacy FIDO methods](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_pf_policy_for_passwordless_authentication_fido_legacy_auth_methods.md)

- [Configuring a RADIUS user profile](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_radius_user_profile.md)

- [Configuring an access from specific countries rule (web policy)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_access_from_specific_countries_rule_web_policy.md)

- [Configuring an allowed devices policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_an_allowed_devices_policy.md): How to configure a PingID allowed devices policy to restrict authentication to specific device brands and models.
- [Configuring an app or group-specific authentication policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_app_group_authentication_policy.md): How to create and apply a PingID web authentication policy to specific applications, user groups, or both, and configure policy rules.

- [Configuring authentication policy](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_authentication_policy_palo_alto.md)
- [Configuring authentication when the device is locked](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_auth_settings_for_locked_device_pidma.md)

- [Configuring authenticator app authentication for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_authenticator_app_authentication_for_pid.md): Overview of PingID external authenticator app authentication using standard TOTP apps, including when to use it and how to enable it.
- [Configuring backup authentication methods](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_backup_authentication_methods.md): How to configure PingID backup authentication so users can sign on via SMS, voice, or email if they don't have access to their primary device.
- [Configuring biometrics authentication for the PingID mobile app](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_biometrics_auth_pidma.md)
- [Configuring Check Point VPN for PingID multi-factor authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_check_point_vpn_multi_factor_authentication.md)

- [Configuring device management](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_device_management.md): How to configure PingID device management: maximum paired devices, device selection, and new device email notifications in PingID admin portal.
- [Configuring direct passcode usage](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_direct_passcode_usage_pidma.md)
- [Configuring email authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_email_authentication.md)
- [Configuring email authentication for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_email_authentication_for_pid.md): How to configure PingID email authentication: How it works with one-time passcodes and editing the template for new authentication requests and email pairing.
- [Configuring email notifications](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_email_notifications.md): Overview of PingID email notifications for new device pairings, including customizable templates and fraud reporting for users.
- [Configuring email notifications](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_email_notifications_task.md)
- [Configuring evaluation expiration](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_evaluation_expiration.md): How to configure the PingID policy applied after the evaluation period ends, by allowing SSO or requiring PingID authentication in the PingID admin portal.
- [Configuring FIDO2 authentication for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_fido2_authentication_method.md): Overview of PingID FIDO2 authentication, including passkeys, supported devices, and high-level steps to enable passwordless or MFA authentication.
- [Configuring FIDO2 authentication method for MFA authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_fido2auth_method_for_mfa_authentication.md)

- [Configuring Global Properties](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_global_properties.md)
- [Configuring identity store provisioners](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_identity_store_provisioners.md)
- [Configuring Juniper as first factor authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_juniper_as_first_factor_authentication.md)
- [Configuring Juniper for PingID multi-factor authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_juniper_for_multifactor_authentication.md)
- [Configuring Kerberos proxy authentication for the PingID desktop app (legacy)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_kerberos_proxy_authentication_for_desktop_app.md)
- [Configuring LDAP attributes in PingFederate](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_ldap_attributes_in_pf.md): How to configure LDAP email and phone attributes in the PingID adapter in PingFederate to support backup authentication and user registration data.
- [Configuring LDAP group behavior in RADIUS Server](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_ldap_group_behavior_radius_server.md)
- [Configuring Microsoft Intune for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_microsoft_intune.md): How to configure Microsoft Intune to manage the PingID app, including APNs certificates, app deployment for iOS and Android, and MDM token maintenance.
- [Configuring Mobile Device Management (MDM)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_mobile_device_management.md): How to configure PingID MDM integration for managed devices, distribute tokens through MDM systems, like MobileIron, Workspace ONE UEM, and Microsoft Intune, and pairing and authentication control.
- [Configuring MobileIron for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_mobileiron_for_pid.md): How to configure MobileIron to manage the PingID app, including APNs certificates, Android for Work, MDM integration, and token maintenance.
- [Configuring MobileIron for PingID MDM integration](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_mobileron_mdm_integration.md)
- [Configuring multiple access mode](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_multiple_access_mode.md)
- [Configuring number matching authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_otp_number_matching_authentication_pidma.md)
- [Configuring OATH token authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_oath_token_authentication.md)
- [Configuring OATH token authentication for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/cxe1564020450447.md): How to configure PingID OATH token authentication, including supported HOTP and TOTP hardware token types and verified device manufacturers.
- [Configuring offline MFA (PingID Adapter)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_adapter_configuring_offline_mfa.md)
- [Configuring offline MFA (RADIUS PCV)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_offline_mfa_radius_pcv.md)
- [Configuring one-time passcode fallback](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_otp_fallback_pidma.md)
- [Configuring OTP push notifications](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_otp_push_notifications_pidma.md)
- [Configuring pairing conditions](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_pairing_conditions.md): How to configure PingID mobile app pairing conditions, including allowed IP ranges and QR code expiration duration.
- [Configuring Palo Alto Authentication Portal for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_palo_alto_authentication_portal.md)
- [Configuring Palo Alto Global Protect for PingID multi-factor authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_palo_alto_global_protect_multifactor_authentication.md)
- [Configuring PAM](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_configuring_pam.md)
- [Configuring passwordless authentication for passkeys](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_fido2_passwordless_auth_passkeys.md)
- [Configuring PingID desktop app authentication](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_desktop_app_authentication.md)
- [Configuring PingID MFA for Microsoft Azure AD Conditional Access](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_integrations/pid_cfg_azure_conditional_access.md)
- [Configuring PingID Proxy for the PingID desktop app (legacy)](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/configuring_pid_desktop_app_proxy.md): How to configure proxy use for the legacy PingID desktop app including Proxy Auto Configuration, Kerberos authentication, and trusted proxy certificates.

- [Configuring SMS and voice authentication for PingID](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_sms_and_voice_authentication.md): How to enable and configure PingID SMS and voice authentication, including pre-population, restrictions, backup options, and daily usage limits.
- [Configuring the CIBA Authenticator for PingID SDK](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_sdk/pid_configuring_ciba_authenticator_pid_sdk.md)

- [Configuring the minimum PingID version](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_minimum_version.md): How to configure the minimum PingID mobile app version permitted for Android and iOS devices to authenticate.
- [Configuring the phone number attribute in PingOne](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_phone_number_attribute_in_p1.md): How to configure the phone number attribute in PingOne to support PingID backup authentication and user registration data pre-population.

- [Configuring the PingID enrollment settings](http://docs.pingidentity.com/pingid/pingid_service_management/pid_configuring_enrollment_settings.md): How to configure PingID enrollment settings, including mandatory enrollment date, self-enrollment, and post-registration policy enforcement.
